
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Pig|kanji=丁亥|romaji=hinoto i|onyomi=teigai|p=dīhài|w=ting-hai|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=deng1 hoi6|j=deng1 hoi6|ci=tɛŋ hɐi|mc=tæŋ ɣəi|oc-bs=tæŋ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|qid=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: teikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

==Years of Yin Fire Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 27 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 27|en|AD 27|qid=Q2360|lt=27 AD|1=AD 27}}
* {{ill|AD 87|en|AD 87|qid=Q30208|lt=87 AD|1=AD 87}}
* {{ill|AD 147|en|AD 147|qid=Q33137|lt=147 AD|1=AD 147}}
* {{ill|207|en|207|qid=Q30779|lt=207 AD|1=207}}
* {{ill|267|en|267|qid=Q32657|lt=267 AD|1=267}}
* {{ill|327|en|327|qid=Q33382|lt=327 AD|1=327}}
* {{ill|387|en|387|qid=Q35302|lt=387 AD|1=387}}
* {{ill|447|en|447|qid=Q33397|lt=447 AD|1=447}}
* {{ill|507|en|507|qid=Q32917|lt=507 AD|1=507}}
* {{ill|567|en|567|qid=Q32555|lt=567 AD|1=567}}
* {{ill|627|en|627|qid=Q30430|lt=627 AD|1=627}}
* {{ill|687|en|687|qid=Q30303|lt=687 AD|1=687}}
* {{ill|AD 747|en|AD 747|qid=Q23620|lt=747 AD|1=AD 747}}
* {{ill|807|en|807|qid=Q30016|lt=807 AD|1=807}}
* {{ill|867|en|867|qid=Q30347|lt=867 AD|1=867}}
* {{ill|927|en|927|qid=Q30470|lt=927 AD|1=927}}
* {{ill|987|en|987|qid=Q23644|lt=987 AD|1=987}}
|
* {{ill|1047|en|1047|qid=Q19357|lt=1047 AD|1=1047}}
* {{ill|1107|en|1107|qid=Q19511|lt=1107 AD|1=1107}}
* {{ill|1167|en|1167|qid=Q19678|lt=1167 AD|1=1167}}
* {{ill|1227|en|1227|qid=Q5407|lt=1227 AD|1=1227}}
* {{ill|1287|en|1287|qid=Q5549|lt=1287 AD|1=1287}}
* {{ill|1347|en|1347|qid=Q6082|lt=1347 AD|1=1347}}
* {{ill|1407|en|1407|qid=Q6134|lt=1407 AD|1=1407}}
* {{ill|1467|en|1467|qid=Q6561|lt=1467 AD|1=1467}}
* {{ill|1527|en|1527|qid=Q6412|lt=1527 AD|1=1527}}
* {{ill|1587|en|1587|qid=Q6744|lt=1587 AD|1=1587}}
* {{ill|1647|en|1647|qid=Q6935|lt=1647 AD|1=1647}}
* {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707 AD|1=1707}}
* {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767 AD|1=1767}}
* {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827 AD|1=1827}}
* {{ill|1887|en|1887|qid=Q7826|lt=1887 AD|1=1887}}
* {{ill|1947|en|1947|qid=Q5263|lt=1947 AD|1=1947}}
|
* {{ill|2007|en|2007|qid=Q2024|lt=2007 AD|1=2007}}
* {{ill|2067 AD|ja|2067年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2067|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2067 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2060年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2127 AD|ja|2127年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2127|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2127 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2187 AD|ja|2187年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2187|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2187 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2247 AD|ja|2247年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2247|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2247 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2307 AD|ja|2307年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2307|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2307 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2367 AD|ja|2367年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2367|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2367 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2427 AD|ja|2427年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2427|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2427 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2487 AD|ja|2487年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2487|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2487 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2547 AD|ja|2547年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2547|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2547 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2607 AD|ja|2607年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2607|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2607 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2667 AD|ja|2667年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2667|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2667 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2727 AD|ja|2727年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2727|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2727 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2787 AD|ja|2787年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2787|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2787 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2847 AD|ja|2847年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2847|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2847 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2907 AD|ja|2907年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2907|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2907 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2967 AD|ja|2967年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2967|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2967 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō|1=Empress Jitō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|qid=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen|1=Fuhonsen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|qid=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake|1=1707 Hōei earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|qid=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption|1=Hōei eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|qid=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|qid=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|qid=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}
== References ==
{{Reflist|2|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Pig|qq=ja|丁亥|version=102335828|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062894|af|Vuurvark (astrologie)|cdo|Dĭng-hâi|de|Feuer-Schwein|fr|Cochon de feu|hak|Tên-hoi|ja|丁亥|ko|정해|nds|Füür-Swien|vi|Đinh Hợi|za|Dinghaih|zh-min-nan|Teng-hāi|zh-yue|丁亥|zh|丁亥|zh-min-nan|Teng-chik|cdo|Dĭng-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Varkvi|de|Yin Fire Pig|de|Feuer-Schweineen|en|Fire Pig|fr|Cochon de feushak|it|Ding-chṳ́id|za|Dingceij|ar|Yin Fire Pig}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
